sections.paragraph:
Λίβανος, ου, ὁ (Theophr., On Plants 9, 7, 1; Diod S 19, 58, 2f) (the) Lebanon, a mountain range in Syria following the coast of the Mediterranean, famous for its cedars 1 Cl 14:5 (Ps 36:35).—Pauly-W. XIII, 1, 1–11. ABD IV 269f.

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

ABD ABD = Anchor Bible Dictionary—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 594
